Legal Document

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026  |  Effective: June 2026  |  IT Act 2000 Compliant

Table of Contents

  1. About This Policy
  2. Information We Collect
  3. How We Use Your Information
  4. Data Storage & Security
  5. Data Sharing
  6. Your Rights
  7. Cookies
  8. Children's Privacy
  9. Changes to This Policy
  10. Contact & Grievance

1 About This Policy

NBF Connect ("we", "our", "platform") is operated by National Bharat Force, headquartered at Hyderabad, Telangana, India. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our platform at nbfconnect.in and its associated services.

By registering on NBF Connect, you agree to the collection and use of information as described in this policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.

This policy complies with the Information Technology Act, 2000 and the Information Technology (Reasonable Security Practices and Procedures and Sensitive Personal Data or Information) Rules, 2011 of India.

2 Information We Collect

We collect the following information when you register and use NBF Connect:

Personal Identification Information:

  • Full name
  • Email address
  • Mobile number (+91)
  • Date of birth (if provided)

Profile Information:

  • State and city of residence
  • Organisation type (NCC / NSS / Scouts / NYKS / Civil Defence)
  • Skills and availability
  • Profile photograph (JPG/PNG, up to 2MB)
  • Resume / CV (PDF/DOC, up to 5MB)
  • Organisation certificates (PDF, for verification)

Usage Data (automatically collected):

  • Pages visited and features used
  • Device type, browser, and operating system
  • IP address and approximate location
  • Login timestamps

3 How We Use Your Information

Your information is used solely for the following purposes:

  • Creating and managing your Shurveer profile
  • Matching your profile with relevant job and internship opportunities
  • Verifying your organisation membership (NCC, NSS, etc.)
  • Sending you opportunity alerts, application updates, and notifications
  • Communicating platform updates and important notices
  • Improving the quality and relevance of the platform
  • Complying with legal obligations
We will never use your data for advertising, profiling for commercial purposes, or unsolicited marketing.

4 Data Storage & Security

Your data is stored securely using Google Firebase (Firestore Database and Firebase Storage), which acts as our data processor. Firebase maintains industry-standard security certifications including ISO 27001 and SOC 2/3.

We implement the following security measures:

  • All data transmitted over HTTPS (TLS encryption)
  • Firestore Security Rules â€” each user can only access their own data
  • Firebase Authentication for secure login and session management
  • Profile photos and resumes stored in Firebase Storage with access controls
  • No passwords stored in plain text â€” managed entirely by Firebase Auth

Data is stored on servers within Google's infrastructure. While primary servers may be located outside India, Google Cloud complies with applicable data protection laws.

5 Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal data to any third party.

Your data may be shared in the following limited circumstances:

  • With Employers: When you apply for an opportunity, your name, skills, state, org type, and resume are shared with the posting employer
  • With Org Admins: Your certificate is shared with authorised NCC/NSS/Scouts/NYKS/Civil Defence administrators for verification purposes only
  • With Service Providers: Google Firebase (data storage), Resend (email delivery) â€” only for platform operations
  • Legal Requirements: If required by Indian law, court order, or government authority

6 Your Rights

As a user of NBF Connect, you have the following rights:

  • Access: Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you
  • Correction: Update or correct any inaccurate information via your profile settings
  • Deletion: Request deletion of your account and all associated data
  • Portability: Request your data in a machine-readable format (JSON)
  • Withdraw Consent: Opt out of non-essential communications at any time

To exercise any of these rights, email us at support@nbfconnect.in with subject line "Data Request â€” [Your Name]". We will respond within 30 days as required by the IT Act.

7 Cookies

NBF Connect uses minimal cookies for the following purposes:

  • Session cookies: To keep you logged in during your session (managed by Firebase Authentication)
  • Preference cookies: To remember your language and display preferences

We do not use advertising cookies or third-party tracking cookies. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but this may affect login functionality.

8 Children's Privacy

NBF Connect is intended for users aged 15 and above. Users between 15â€“18 years must have parental consent before registering. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If we discover that a user under 13 has registered, their account will be deleted immediately.

9 Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. When we make significant changes, we will:

  • Update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page
  • Send an email notification to all registered users
  • Display a notice on the platform for 30 days

Continued use of NBF Connect after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

10 Contact & Grievance Officer

For any privacy concerns, data requests, or complaints, please contact our designated Grievance Officer as required under the IT Act 2000:

Grievance Officer

Dilsukhnagar, Hyderabad, Telangana 500035

Response time: Within 30 days of receiving complaint
